Abdul writes to his son Ahmed "Dear Ahmed," so goes the letter. "I want to plant some vegetables in my garden so that we can have some home-grown food in the winter. But you know how bad my back is. Could you please come visit me and help me with it?"  The reply comes soon. "Father, I am sorry but I am preoccupied with work, so I can't help. And I'm not sure we should be digging up your garden, because as I recall, my friend Amir hid *the thing* there."  The very next day, security services show up at Abdul's home, check every nook and cranny, cause the old man quite a fright, but eventually, finding nothing, they leave. Abdul, distressed, writes back to Ahmed.  "Dear Ahmed! A bunch of guys in black suits showed up today, trampled mud all over the house, and poked their nose into everything they could find! They left and let me go, but what was that all about?"  And the reply  "Father; they dug up the garden too, haven't they? You can plant your vegetables now. Again, I am sorry I could not help otherwise, but I'll make it up to you with my potato salad that you like so much. Love, Ahmed."

A man wants to jump off a bridge... (This joke is courtesy of Emo Philips)  I was walking across a bridge one day, and I saw a man standing on the edge, about to jump off. So I ran over and said "Stop! Don't do it!"  "Why shouldn't I?" he said.   "Well, there's so much to live for!"   "Like what?"   "Well... are you religious?"   He said yes.   I said, "Me too! Are you Christian or Buddhist?"   "Christian."   "Me too! Are you Catholic or Protestant?   "Protestant."  "Me too! Are you Episcopalian or Baptist?"  "Baptist"  "Wow! Me too!  Are you Baptist Church of God or Baptist Church of the Lord?"  "Baptist Church of God!"  "Me too! Are you original Baptist Church of God, or are you reformed Baptist Church of God?"  "Reformed Baptist Church of God!"  "Me too! Are you Reformed Baptist Church of God, reformation of 1879, or Reformed Baptist Church of God, reformation of 1915?"  He said, "Reformed Baptist Church of God, reformation of 1915!"   I said, "Die, heretic scum", and pushed him off.

The hitcher has the driver pull over and stop the car. “I just broke out of jail, and I need to get as far away from here as I can.” He makes the driver strip naked, ties his wrists to his ankles, and pushes him down a small ravine, just enough to waste some time getting back up. When the driver makes it to the side of the road, there’s no traffic. He’s so frustrated he’s about to cry. Then he sees a semi truck rolling down the road his way. Still tied up, he jumps up and down to be seen, and sure enough the truck pulls over. The Ladies Department A man walked into the ladies department of a Macy's, one of  the largest department store chains.   He shyly walked up to the woman behind the  counter and said, "I'd like to buy a bra for my wife."  "What type of bra?"  asked the clerk.  "Type?" inquires the man "There is more than one  type?"  "Look Around," said the saleslady, as she showed a sea of bras in every shape, size color and material.  "Actually, even with all of this  variety, there are really only three types of bras," replied the salesclerk.  Confused, the man asked what were the types.  The saleslady replied "The  Catholic type, the, Salvation Army type, and the Baptist type. Which one do you  need?"  Still confused the man asked, "What is the difference between  them?"  The lady responded "It is all really quite simple. The Catholic type supports the masses, the Salvation Army type lifts up the fallen, and the Baptist type makes mountains out of mole hills."
